fundamentals.name: Datadog, Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: Datadog, Inc. operates an observability and security platform for cloud applications in the United States and internationally. The company's products comprise infrastructure and application performance monitoring, log management, observability pipelines, synthetics, real user monitoring, product analytics, continuous profiler, database monitoring, data observability, LLM observability, error tracking, network monitoring, incident response, workflow automation and App builder, event management, bits AI SRE, cloud cost management, cloud security, code security, cloud SIEM, threat management, sensitive data scanner, and CI visibility. Datadog, Inc. was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in New York, New York.

judgment.summary: High-growth company with strong revenue and earnings expansion, but trades at a very high valuation and has thin operating margins.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 18.3% (0.60 vs 0.51); next earnings date is 2026-08-06.
positives: Revenue growth 32.2% YoY and quarterly earnings growth 113.4% indicate strong business momentum.
Forward P/E of 77.93 is significantly lower than trailing P/E of 583.71, suggesting expected earnings growth.
Gross margin of 79.9% is best-in-class, supporting high revenue growth.
Total cash of $4.76B provides ample liquidity, with free cash flow of $936.73M.
Consensus rating is 'strong_buy' with a mean target price above the current spot price.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 583.71 and Price/Sales of 21.50 indicate an extremely high valuation.
Operating margin of 0.8% and profit margin of 3.7% are very thin despite high revenue growth.
Return on equity of 3.9% and return on assets of -0.2% are weak.
Debt/Equity ratio of 32.22 is high, though offset by substantial cash reserves.

news.paragraph: Datadog is positioned to benefit from the increasing adoption of AI in production environments, with recent articles highlighting its strong performance and positive outlook. The company recently surpassed its first $1 billion quarter and raised its 2026 outlook, leading to a price target increase to $255 by BTIG. A golden cross signal has also appeared, suggesting potential upside for investors.
